name: Grid
description: CSS grid wrapper with columns + gap as props.

api.name: Grid
api.description: CSS grid wrapper with columns + gap as props.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: Number of grid columns (emitted as grid-cols-N, or the responsive 1–6 ramp when Responsive is true). Default 1.

parameters.name: Responsive
parameters.description: When true the grid collapses to 1 column on mobile and 2 on small screens, expanding to Columns only at the lg breakpoint — so a many-column grid stays readable on phones. Uses statically-known responsive utility strings (purge-safe) for 1–6 columns; falls back to a fixed grid-cols-N for other counts. Off by default (unchanged behavior). (#250)

parameters.name: Gap
parameters.description: Tailwind spacing scale value applied as gap-{value} on both axes. Default "4"; set null to omit.

parameters.name: RowGap
parameters.description: Tailwind spacing scale value applied as gap-y-{value}, overriding the row gap independently of Gap.

parameters.name: ColGap
parameters.description: Tailwind spacing scale value applied as gap-x-{value}, overriding the column gap independently of Gap.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the grid's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the grid's root element.

mdSummary:
# Grid

CSS grid wrapper with columns + gap as props.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/grid

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Grid | Columns | `int` | `1` | Number of grid columns (emitted as grid-cols-N, or the responsive 1–6 ramp when Responsive is true). Default 1. |
| Grid | Responsive | `bool` | `false` | When true the grid collapses to 1 column on mobile and 2 on small screens, expanding to Columns only at the lg breakpoint — so a many-column grid stays readable on phones. Uses statically-known responsive utility strings (purge-safe) for 1–6 columns; falls back to a fixed grid-cols-N for other counts. Off by default (unchanged behavior). (#250) |
| Grid | Gap | `string?` | `"4"` | Tailwind spacing scale value applied as gap-{value} on both axes. Default "4"; set null to omit. |
| Grid | RowGap | `string?` | `` | Tailwind spacing scale value applied as gap-y-{value}, overriding the row gap independently of Gap. |
| Grid | ColGap | `string?` | `` | Tailwind spacing scale value applied as gap-x-{value}, overriding the column gap independently of Gap. |
| Grid | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The grid's items. |
| Grid | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the grid's root element. |
| Grid | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the grid's root element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Grid) — The grid's items.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Grid />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Grid/Grid.razor`
